description: Striker's shoulder is level with the last defender as the ball is played forward by a teammate from midfield; no other defender is closer to the goal line.
Striker's foot is clearly ahead of the last defender's torso when the through-ball is played; striker runs onto it and scores.
Player in an offside position when the ball is played receives it but is not interfering with play, standing in their own half near the touchline far from the action.
ground_truth: Not Offside - not involved in active play

description: Very tight offside call decided by a margin of a few centimeters using semi-automated offside technology lines, attacker's armpit marginally ahead of defender's shoulder.
Defender's arm is away from the body in a non-natural position and the ball strikes it inside the penalty box while attempting to block a cross.
Ball strikes a defender's arm at close range while the arm is tucked tight to the body during a goalmouth scramble.
ground_truth: No Penalty - ball-to-hand, arm in natural position

description: Attacking player's hand makes clear contact with the ball before it goes into the net.
Defender makes clear contact on the attacker's standing leg before touching the ball during a tackle inside the box, attacker through on goal with no covering defender.
Attacker goes down inside the box after minimal contact from a defender's trailing leg, with the attacker already off balance before contact.
Goalkeeper collides with an onrushing attacker inside the box after the keeper has already gathered the ball cleanly.
ground_truth: Penalty - careless/reckless challenge by goalkeeper after gaining control

description: Defender, last player back, deliberately handles the ball on the goal line to stop it crossing into the net.
ground_truth: Red Card (DOGSO - handball denying a goal) + Penalty

description: Player lunges into a tackle with excessive force, studs up, making contact above the ankle with the opponent's standing leg, ball not in playing distance.
Two players jostle off the ball away from play after a whistle, one shoves the other in the chest with both hands, no punches thrown.
ground_truth: Yellow Card - unsporting behavior/no excessive force
